text: after the eigen-arc, a different kind of convergence. the wheat field does not solve for its attractor — the wind just moves, and the pattern emerges. two views: aerial geometry, macro detail. same flow, different resolution.

images.alt: an aerial view of a wheat field in golden light, the blades forming wave patterns like mathematical topography
a close-up of golden grass blades radiating outward in sweeping curves, topography-like detail
